case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. VS. CAL-CON PUMPING, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAL-CON PUMPING, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAL-CON CONCRETE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-2015
DECLARATION REDUCTION OF FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICES, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-01-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST STEVEN D CRIBB FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-01-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-21-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE SEP-01-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST STEVEN D CRIBB FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-01-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-17-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-01-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100009989)
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICES, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-01-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
